short_summary: Iran deal progress, shadow fleet seizure
rationale: Potential Iran deal offers mild energy price relief for Romania; UK seizure of Russian shadow fleet tanker in the Channel is a modest positive for Black Sea regional security context; no new escalation near Romania's borders.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reportedly close to signing
top_events.summary: Progress toward a US-Iran deal could reduce energy costs for Romania, which remains sensitive to gas and oil price fluctuations. Conflicting signals keep outcome uncertain.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Seizure of a Russian shadow fleet vessel tightens sanctions enforcement; Romania as a Black Sea NATO member benefits from increased pressure on Russia's oil export workarounds.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap referendum
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on capping population reflects EU-wide migration tensions; limited direct impact on Romania but part of broader regional migration policy context.
